papers.evidence: 通过构造子群交非有限生成，直接证明SL(3,Z)不具有Howson性质
papers.tldr: SL(3,Z)是否为Howson群（两有限生成子群的交仍有限生成）是群论中的一个问题。本文在标准抛物子群Z²⋊SL(2,Z)中构造了两个2生成子群，将它们的交转化为自由群在Z²上仿射作用的点稳定子，并通过分析Schreier图证明该稳定子非有限生成，从而给出SL(3,Z)不是Howson群的反例。进一步构造了秩为4的子群序列，使其交的秩可任意大但仍有限生成，深化了对SL(3,Z)子群结构的理解。
papers.abstract_en: We give an explicit construction of two $2$-generated subgroups $H,K\leq \SL(3,\Z)$ whose intersection is not finitely generated. The construction takes place inside the standard parabolic subgroup $\Z^2\rtimes \SL(2,\Z)\leq \SL(3,\Z)$. The main point is to identify $H\cap K$ with the stabilizer of a point for an affine action of a free group on $\Z^2$, and then to prove, using the Schreier graph of this action, that this stabilizer is not finitely generated. Furthermore, we prove that there exists a sequence of subgroups $H_q, K_q \leq \SL(3,\mathbb{Z})$ such that $\rank(H_q)=\rank(K_q)=4$, and \[ \rank(H_q\cap K_q)\geq q+1, \] while $H_q\cap K_q$ is finitely generated.
